questions.enonce: Who were the members of the 'Windrush Generation' ?
options: People from the Caribbean who moved to the UK after WWII

questions.enonce: They were invited to help rebuild Great Britain after the war.
The ship that brought the first group in 1948 was the Empire {{1}}.

pairs.right: Association of 56 member states, mostly former territories of the British Empire
How the UK was perceived by many Caribbean people
Unreasonable dislike or distrust of people who are different

questions.enonce: What kind of jobs did many Windrush immigrants take in the UK ?
options: Jobs in the NHS, transport, and postal services
